ogTitle: Parramatta Park vs Pasha: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Parramatta Park and Pasha.
heading: Parramatta Park vs Pasha — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Parramatta Park, Queensland and Pasha, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Parramatta Park has a lower overall climate risk score (26/100) compared to Pasha (32/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Parramatta Park or Pasha safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Parramatta Park has a flood risk score of 23/100, while Pasha scores 46/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Parramatta Park scores 47/100 for bushfire risk. Pasha scores 39/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Parramatta Park or Pasha?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Parramatta Park has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.35% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
